title: Elytra Trims Datapack
description: Server support for Elytra Trims mod
body:
# Elytra Trims Server
Enables smithing recipes for [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims) on a server. This is only required on a dedicated server, in singleplayer mod will enable this functionality on its own.

## Note:
**Since version 1.1.0 main mod includes features beyond armor trims. Datapack doesn't provide support for those. To enable server-side functionality install mod on the server.**
